benchmarks.title: Host-Schedule Vector Operations
benchmarks.description: Compiles a CUDA callable with nvcc, prepares it through the CUDA host runtime, launches it from the host, and validates copied-back vector data.
benchmarks.math: For add, out[i] = a[i] + b[i]. The same ABI is also used for unary, scalar, ternary, and quad vector smoke rows.

benchmarks.title: Persistent Layered-Cross Graph
benchmarks.description: Runs a nine-task explicit graph descriptor through the CUDA persistent-device runtime to validate multi-root, multi-fan-in, and scratch-lifetime behavior.
benchmarks.math: The graph combines add, multiply, scale, and fan-in tasks. The review invariant is descriptor correctness: fan-in 0,0,0,2,3,1,2,3,2 and dependents 3,3,4,4,5,4,6,7,6,7,7,8,8.

benchmarks.title: Tensor-Core Tile DAG
benchmarks.description: Runs the tensor-core persistent DAG row with a 16x16x16 descriptor and compares it with CUDA Graph and cuBLAS baselines.
benchmarks.math: A WMMA m16n16k8 TF32/F32 tile contributes C = A x B, followed by the same residual, gate, and fan-in elementwise task family used by the scalar tensor DAG.
